form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a fast 22.72 over 400m finishing third at Warragul. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a fast 22.72 over 400m finishing third at Warragul. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording four placings in a row, before finishing fifth (26.33) at Warragul last start. Has a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording four placings in a row, before finishing fifth (26.33) at Warragul last start. Has a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.3 lengths in 19.23, beating Dusty Danae. Last start finished last on March 27 over 350m at this track behind Better Banjo beaten 6 lengths (19.90) in a Special conditions Veteran race. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (17.15) at this track, making it two placings on end. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.
Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split last time and setting up a 1.5 lengths win at Sandown over 515m in 29.76, making it two wins on end. In top form and can make it three straight.

form.formComment: Having his first run at this track. Comes off an average run last start over 400m at Geelong when eighth behind Paw Palmer (23.32) in Grade 5. Not up to this.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 1.3 lengths at this track (19.57) beating Taste in a Mix 6/7 FIN on March 27. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 300m at this track. Happy to risk this time.
